reviewNotes: This migration doctor reads manifest, export, and sync-plan artifacts only. It does not send live Grocy write requests.
Review the computed sync plan against examples/config-export.example.json before any confirmed apply step.
Treat Grocy version changes, repo-managed drift, and manual-review items as upgrade checkpoints for the GitOps migration.
